transcript.clean_text: expo dubai our starting point and finishing point on stage six of the uae tour 180 kilometers to be taken on in a moderate temperature of around 27 celsius and very little wind to be concerned about while staying amongst all of these magnificent modern buildings there's a lot of i guess protection to be offered up to the pack as well the breakaway would surely be tempted by intermediate sprints but surely we were heading for a bunch sprint as always out they came from the exhibition center to play the game today or playing the breakaway game constantly throughout this race have been gas bomb rusevelo and they put three men up front including the black jersey of dimitri strakov he getting greedy for intermediate sprints and with the backup of kachetkov and the young czech rider matty vachek he had a big advantage two made it from bardiani canaveral though was to drop back to the pack leaving tornelli up front with paul lapera from 82r citra timing is what this is all about with 35 kilometers to go it was a minute and 25 was the gap it had been paired back to less than a minute and then the paladin eased off they were shooting the breeze putting in the gels and the fluids then we started to head for home and the gap was still there could the breakaway make it well there seemed to be no panic at this point with 11 kilometers to go but at minute 22 that was starting to look like the breakaway had a chance and as the kilometers arched down the gap remained and a late push from the pack was all too late it was going to be the breakaway well gasprom have been brave enough to get themselves into that break on every single occasion where one has been in the offing and so it was that they came to the finale with three men and had to be favourites to take it in the end it was the youthful strength of matthias vachek that was to have the edge he pushed on once kachekov pulled off struck off in the black jersey had done his job to take that competition but a stage win for a breakaway something very special for the youngster from the czech republic 19 years of age fifth in the road race nationals now the biggest win of his career as for the sprinters within the main bunch jasper phillipson led them home dylan dronevegan nearest man to him but all too late to make an impact on the day's results vatchek supreme and the breakaway given its reward after many days where they'd had their chances today they took it well still a teenager and when he looks back at the roster of those he has beaten today matthias vachek will be delighted to have got his senior career off to a winning start fabulous performance by him and a wake-up call for everybody else watch this man well the raw said it all that check took it ahead of lipera struck off tonelly kuchetkov philip simner head of grunderwegen ackermann barbier and mylan rounding out the top ten so a new winner and the breakaway finally got home a day that matthias vachek will never forget and indeed the peliton must never forget the breakaway always has a chance what will happen tomorrow well tell gacha is out to be crowned but he only leads by four seconds from people ghana but vlassof yates paulus almeida bilbao all have to believe that they have got a chance of removing that red jersey from the back of telepocatcha will they do it well you'll have to tune in to find out as we run 148 kilometers to jabil hafeet jabra her feet itself at the end of a long flat day so like an ice hockey stick if you will with its end tilted up it all happens at the very last a great finale in the offing then for what's been a terrific race the uae tour we had a surprise today will there be one tomorrow i'm afraid you're going to have to tune in to find out the burj khalifa points to the sky and so will the road at the end of this great race you
